creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
The information comes late, but once again "Solutions Linux",
one of the major "business" open source event in france
takes place in Paris in May.
Here comes some information to fill the event schedule :)

PS: Notice that a BSD certification exam will take place during the event 
--- 

Solutions Linux 2011, CNIT , Paris, France
When : 10 - 12 May, 2011
Location : CNIT - Paris La Défense - Hall Marie Curie

A 3 days event to promote GNU/Linux and Open Source Software to companies. 
As usual, a French FreeBSD User Group will be there to promote FreeBSD. The access to the event is free of charge.
A BSD Certification exam will take place during the event.


Solutions Linux : http://www.solutionslinux.fr/
BSDFrance : http://www.solutionslinux.fr/exposant_1669_1670_p.html?eid=345
FreeBSD   : http://www.solutionslinux.fr/exposant_1669_1670_p.html?eid=364
----

regards
